title: Retro Console
description: This model captures my love of retro gaming. My first introduction to gaming was the Nintendo DS Lite. I thhen moved to the Nintendo 3DS then the Nintendo Switch. Till this day I regret selling the 3DS for the Switch. So I got a retro console emulator to get that old nostalgic feeling and play games I nver did as well relieve beloved games.

title: Pick Axe
description: A pickaxe does not wait for opportunity, it creates it. This model represents my drive to work hard, stay focused and carve out the future I want for myself, one swing at a time. No one sees the hours of hard work or the moments spent doubting and wondering if all the hard work will beworth it, but we keep pushing one day at a time.
